description: TUNGSTEN 9.42 built by chat-side Fable 5 full sweep. 7 fixes: HTF bar misalignment (critical), transition matrix regime-8 truncation, regime-duration hazard continuationProb, ProbDB evidence pooling + Bayesian shrinkage, session threshold seeding bug, IC calibrated geometry, cross-pair time alignment. COMPILE-VERIFY ONLY: open in MetaEditor, compile, report errors/warnings via relay. Do not modify unless compile fails; if it fails, fix minimally and report exactly what was changed.
